title: Águila calva (Haliaeetus leucocephalus), Parque Estatal de Recreo del Lago Chilkoot, Haines, Alaska, Estados Unidos, 2017-08-26, DD 02
description: Adult bald eagle (Haliaeetus leucocephalus) perched on a spruce branch at Chilkoot Lake State Recreation Site near Haines, Alaska, photographed by Diego Delso on 26 August 2017 during his documented Alaska expedition.
alt: Adult bald eagle perched on a spruce branch at Chilkoot Lake near Haines, Alaska
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-11 — file visually confirmed against title; Diego Delso is a confirmed CC BY-SA 4.0 contributor (Wikimedia Creator:Diego_Delso), his standard license for all published files, and the 2017-08-26 Haines sequence is consistent with his documented Alaska trip (2017-08-19 at Margerie Glacier, 2017-08-28 at Tanana River)
